assumptions: Seeded BFD used for deterministic stage execution.
bfd_mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A[Feed Storage] --> B[Feed Preparation]
  B --> C[Reactor]
  C --> D[Separation]
  D --> E[Purification]
  E --> F[Product Storage]
markdown: Raw materials are metered, reacted, and purified through a simple seeded sequence.
